title: Commitment to Health & Wellbeing
content: Capella Bangkok prioritizes the health and wellbeing of its guests and staff, with measures in place to prevent the spread of Covid-19.

title: Riverside Escape Package
content: The Riverside Escape package includes a complimentary third night, daily breakfast for two guests, a bottle of house Champagne, and access to The Living Room, offering curated Capella Moments and daily cultural experiences.

title: Wellness and Relaxation
content: Guests can enjoy daily sunrise yoga by the river, as well as a complimentary 30-minute wellness massage on arrival in a Riverfront Villa.

title: Personalized Service
content: Each guest is assigned a Capella Culturist, a personal assistant who can help plan and customize their stay.

title: Our Commitment to Health & Wellbeing
content: Capella Bangkok prioritizes the health and wellbeing of its guests and staff, with measures in place to ensure a safe and clean environment.

title: Weekday & Weekend Getaway Package
content: Enjoy a luxurious getaway with daily breakfast, resort credit, and a range of perks, including panoramic river views and a private balcony.

title: Resort Credit
content: Guests can use their resort credit of THB 3,000.- net for various amenities and services, excluding retail and non-accumulative.

title: Flexible Check-in/Check-out
content: Guests can enjoy flexible check-in and check-out times, subject to availability, for a more relaxed and personalized experience.

title: Côte Hours
content: Côte, the hotel's restaurant, is open from Wednesday to Sunday, offering a range of dining options for guests.

title: Booking and Cancellation Policies
content: Please refer to the booking engine page for payment and cancellation policies, including a credit card guarantee and potential charges.

title: Holistic Wellness Experiences
content: Indulge in refined cuisine and holistic wellness experiences, turning every moment into one to be savoured. Daily sunrise yoga by the river, fostering relaxation and renewal.

title: Personalized Capella Hospitality
content: Enjoy bespoke privileges, including daily breakfast by the river, and thoughtful touches that transform your riverside retreat into a lingering memory.

title: Exclusive Benefits for Villa Guests
content: Villa guests enjoy fast-track airport services, round-trip limousine transfer, and a 30-minute wellness massage upon arrival.

title: Riverfront Villa Perks
content: Guests staying in a Riverfront Villa can enjoy additional perks, including round-trip limousine service, arrival fast-track service, and a 30-minute wellness massage on arrival.

title: New Year's Eve Gala Dinner
content: The New Year's Eve Gala Dinner is a refined celebration featuring live music and an exquisite dinner, with fireworks illuminating the Chao Phraya River.

title: Capella Culturist
content: Each guest is assigned a personal Capella Culturist, who can assist with planning and arranging activities and experiences during their stay.

title: Amenities and Services
content: The hotel offers a range of amenities and services, including a non-alcoholic minibar, complimentary pressing for up to five pieces of clothing, and a resort shuttle boat service to ICONSIAM and Sathorn Pier.

title: Covid-19 Commitment to Health & Wellbeing
content: Capella Bangkok is committed to ensuring the health and wellbeing of its guests and staff. For more information, please visit our commitment to health and wellbeing page.

title: Sunday Seafood Brunch Schedule
content: The Sunday Seafood Brunch is available every other Sunday. Please check the schedule by calling +66 2 098 3817 or +66 65 998 4690.

title: Reservations and Cancellation Policies
content: Reservations are recommended and can be made by calling +662 098 3817 or +66 65 998 4690. For payment and cancellation policies, please refer to the booking engine page.

title: Contact Information
content: For general inquiries, please contact info.bangkok@capellahotels.com or call +66 2 098 3888. For events and celebrations, please contact events.bangkok@capellahotels.com. For meetings, please contact mice.bangkok@capellahotels.com.
